name: calculator
description: Performs basic arithmetic calculations — add, subtract, multiply, divide.

tools.name: add
tools.description: Adds two numbers together and returns the sum.

tools.name: subtract
tools.description: Subtracts b from a and returns the result.

tools.name: multiply
tools.description: Multiplies two numbers and returns the product.

tools.name: divide
tools.description: Divides a by b. Returns an error if b is zero.
